description: record_read called on a document-image ARK (3:1:3Q9M-C95G-HQZ6-W) — the WRONG tool for an image. Mirrors the production guard added in `record_read` (rejects 3:1:/3:2: ARKs before any fetch and routes to image_read); record_read is not a LIVE_TOOL, so this fixture reproduces that guard's redirect error in the harness. The `recordId` predicate substring-matches the distinctive image ARK id, so it catches both the bare 3:1: form and the canonical ark:/61903/3:1:... form. Its purpose is to make an errant record_read-on-image-ARK call return the actionable redirect (not a confusing fixture_not_found), so the test can grade whether the skill RECOVERS by routing to image_read.

response.message: This is a document-image ARK (3:1:/3:2:), not a record persona. record_read reads record personas (1:1:); use the image_read tool with this ARK to fetch the image.
